lines.english: and I have taken the support of the Saints as my mind's support.
I have given up my excessive cleverness and scheming,
Please shower me with Your Mercy, O Lord God!

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਾਰੁ ਕੀ ਪੁਤਰੀ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: chhaar kee putaree param gat paaee |
lines.english: Even a puppet of ashes attains the supreme status,
O Nanak, if it has the help and support of the Saints. ||23||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਰ ਜੁਲਮ ਫੂਲਹਿ ਘਨੋ ਕਾਚੀ ਦੇਹ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jor julam fooleh ghano kaachee deh bikaar |
lines.english: Practicing oppression and tyranny, he puffs himself up; he acts in corruption with his frail, perishable body.
Pauree:
JAJJA: When someone, in his ego, believes that he has become something,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਪਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਛੁਟਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ahanbudh bandhan pare naanak naam chhuttaar |1|
lines.english: He is bound by his egotistical intellect; O Nanak, salvation comes only through the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||
When he believes, in his ego, that he is a devotee and a spiritual teacher,
he is caught in his error, like a parrot in a trap.
then, in the world hereafter, the Lord of the Universe shall have no regard for him at all.
he is merely a peddler wandering over the earth.
O Nanak, meets the Lord. ||24||
When he believes himself to be a preacher,
But one who conquers his ego in the Company of the Holy,
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰ੍ਹਾ ਤੁਝੈ ਨ ਬਿਆਪਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਟੈ ਉਪਾਧਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaarhaa tujhai na biaapee naanak mittai upaadh |1|
lines.english: Anxiety shall not afflict you, O Nanak, and your misfortune shall vanish. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਾਲਾਘੇ ਉਠਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਨਿਸਿ ਬਾਸੁਰ ਆਰਾਧਿ ॥
lines.translit: jhaalaaghe utth naam jap nis baasur aaraadh |
lines.english: Rise early in the morning, and chant the Naam; worship and adore the Lord, night and day.
JHAJHA: Your sorrows shall depart,
when you deal with the Lord's Name.
Pauree:
The faithless cynic dies in sorrow and pain;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਹੋਤ ਭਾਉ ਬੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai ridai hot bhaau beea |
lines.english: his heart is filled with the love of duality.
listening to the ambrosial speech in the Society of the Saints.
Your evil deeds and sins shall fall away, O my mind,
O Nanak, from those who are blessed by the Mercy of the Lord of the World. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਞਤਨ ਕਰਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਅਨਿਕ ਬਿਧਿ ਰਹਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: yatan karahu tum anik bidh rehan na paavahu meet |
lines.english: You can try all sorts of things, but you still cannot remain here, my friend.
Salok:
Sexual desire, anger and wickedness fall away,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤ ਰਹਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਜਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਪਰੀਤਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeevat rahahu har har bhajahu naanak naam pareet |1|
lines.english: But you shall live forevermore, O Nanak, if you vibrate and love the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਞੋ ਪੇਖਉ ਸੋ ਬਿਨਸਤਉ ਕਾ ਸਿਉ ਕਰੀਐ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: yo pekhau so binastau kaa siau kareeai sang |
lines.english: Whoever I see shall perish. With whom should I associate?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣਤੀ ਗਣਉ ਨ ਗਣਿ ਸਕਉ ਊਠਿ ਸਿਧਾਰੇ ਕੇਤ ॥
lines.translit: ganatee gnau na gan skau aootth sidhaare ket |
lines.english: You may count and calculate as much as you want, but you cannot count how many have arisen and departed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਞੰਞਾ ਞਾਣਹੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਸਹੀ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਤ ਏਹ ਹੇਤ ॥
lines.translit: yanyaa yaanahu drirr sahee binas jaat eeh het |
lines.english: NYANYA: Know this as absolutely correct, that that this ordinary love shall come to an end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਞਾਣਤ ਸੋਈ ਸੰਤੁ ਸੁਇ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਤੇ ਕੀਚਿਤ ਭਿੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: yaanat soee sant sue bhram te keechit bhin |
lines.english: He alone knows, and he alone is a Saint, who is free of doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਞਾਣਹੁ ਇਆ ਬਿਧਿ ਸਹੀ ਚਿਤ ਝੂਠਉ ਮਾਇਆ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: yaanahu eaa bidh sahee chit jhootthau maaeaa rang |
lines.english: Know this as true in your consciousness, that the love of Maya is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਤੇ ਤਿਹ ਕਢਹੁ ਜਿਹ ਹੋਵਹੁ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: andh koop te tih kadtahu jih hovahu suprasan |
lines.english: He is lifted up and out of the deep dark pit; the Lord is totally pleased with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਞਾ ਕੈ ਹਾਥਿ ਸਮਰਥ ਤੇ ਕਾਰਨ ਕਰਨੈ ਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: yaa kai haath samarath te kaaran karanai jog |
lines.english: God's Hand is All-powerful; He is the Creator, the Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਹ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਉ ਞਾਹੂ ਕੀਓ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: naanak tih usatat krau yaahoo keeo sanjog |26|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the One, who joins us to Himself. ||26||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੂਟੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਸਾਧ ਸੇਵ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ttootte bandhan janam maran saadh sev sukh paae |
lines.english: The bondage of birth and death is broken and peace is obtained, by serving the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਬੀਸਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਰਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak manahu na beesarai gun nidh gobid raae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, may I never forget from my mind, the Treasure of Virtue, the Sovereign Lord of the Universe. ||1||
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਟਹਲ ਕਰਹੁ ਤਉ ਏਕ ਕੀ ਜਾ ਤੇ ਬ੍ਰਿਥਾ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ttehal karahu tau ek kee jaa te brithaa na koe |
lines.english: Work for the One Lord; no one returns empty-handed from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਟਹਲ ਮਹਲ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਸਾਧ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: ttehal mehal taa kau milai jaa kau saadh kripaal |
lines.english: He alone obtains the Lord's service, and the Mansion of His Presence, unto whom the Holy Saint is compassionate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਹੀਐ ਬਸੈ ਜੋ ਚਾਹਹੁ ਸੋ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan mukh heeai basai jo chaahahu so hoe |
lines.english: When the Lord abides within your mind, body, mouth and heart, then whatever you desire shall come to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੋਹੇ ਟਾਹੇ ਬਹੁ ਭਵਨ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: ttohe ttaahe bahu bhavan bin naavai sukh naeh |
lines.english: I have searched and searched, across so many worlds, but without the Name, there is no peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਤਉ ਬਸੈ ਜਉ ਆਪਨ ਹੋਹਿ ਦਇਆਲ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sangat tau basai jau aapan hohi deaal |
lines.english: He joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, only when the Lord Himself shows His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਟਲਹਿ ਜਾਮ ਕੇ ਦੂਤ ਤਿਹ ਜੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: ttaleh jaam ke doot tih ju saadhoo sang samaeh |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death retreats from those who dwell in the Saadh Sangat.
Again and again, I am forever devoted to the Saints.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਧਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo jan prabh apune kare naanak te dhan dhan |1|
lines.english: Those humble beings whom God has made His own, O Nanak, are blessed, so very blessed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕ ਨ ਹੋਤੀ ਤਿਨਹੁ ਦਰਿ ਜਿਹ ਹੋਵਹੁ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: tthaak na hotee tinahu dar jih hovahu suprasan |
lines.english: Those beings, with whom the Lord is thoroughly pleased, meet with no obstacles at His Door.
O Nanak, my sins from so long ago have been erased. ||27||
